item.description: been busy trying to make this happen. it's been a long summer so far, with a lot of good news and even better news. i've been able to get my surgery date booked, i've been actively putting myself out there and trying to build my network of DJs and trying to find more opportunities to perform. i'm over the moon having gotten the chance to play at mood ring, which is a great place for someone new to the scene to cut their teeth.
